optimization.llm_reasoning_summary: This itinerary optimizes for a balanced, laid-back experience with minimal backtracking and adherence to budget and time constraints.

days.llm_notes: First day includes early arrival, check-in, breakfast, morning attraction, lunch, afternoon attraction, and dinner.
Second day is a full non-travel day with breakfast, morning attraction, lunch, afternoon attraction, and dinner.
Last day includes breakfast, morning attraction, lunch, and ends with the return flight.

properties.description: The largest children's museum in the world just got even bigger with the addition of a new 7.5-acre outdoor health and fitness area that encourages activity through multiple sports. The new space, called Riley Children's Health Sports Legends Experience includes basketball, football, hockey, soccer, pedal car racing (drag strip and oval track), golf, baseball, and tennis. The indoor portion of the new area includes the National Art Museum of Sport along with the World of Sport and History of Hoops. The Children's Museum of Indianapolis itself is made up of 500,000 square feet with exhibits and activities that are fun and interesting for the entire family as they explore the physical and natural sciences, history, world cultures and the arts through exciting interactive exhibits on five floors. Families will discover some of the most rare dinosaur fossils in the world and see what it's like to live and work in space. There's also a theater with children's plays and live entertainment.

properties.name: Conner's Kitchen + Bar
properties.description: Conner's Kitchen + Bar is downtown Indy's hang-out worthy spot. From breakfast to nightcaps, enjoy elevated comfort food, craveable favorites, craft beers, and signature cocktails.

properties.name: High Velocity
properties.description: High Velocity has you covered in all things sports. Root for your favorite team on one of over 60 HDTVs while enjoying modern American Fare, local beers on draft and hand-crafted cocktails. Going to the game? Be on the lookout for Game Day Specials before you head to nearby Colts, Pacers and Indianapolis Indians games -all in walkable distance!
